title: Execution History + Replay

routeChanges: client/src/components/DashboardLayout.tsx - added sidebar entry with History icon

executionHistoryPage.statsCards: Total, success rate, succeeded, failed, avg duration
executionHistoryPage.filtering: By status (all/success/failed/running/timeout/cancelled/needs_input), date range (all/today/week/month), search by task name/description/ID
executionHistoryPage.table: ID, task, status badge, steps count, duration, started time, actions
executionHistoryPage.pagination: 20 items per page with page number navigation

executionDetailModal.summaryBar: Task, duration, steps, started, attempt number
executionDetailModal.timelineTab: Step-by-step timeline with dot indicators, tool/action names, reasoning (with Brain icon), results, errors, screenshot links, duration per step
executionDetailModal.replayTab: BrowserBase session recording viewer integration, debug URL link, BrowserBase session link

exportReport.contents: Overview, error details, step-by-step breakdown, output JSON

browserBaseReplay.sessionLink: Direct link to BrowserBase session page

backendEndpointsUsed: agent.listExecutions - paginated list with status filter
agent.getExecution - single execution detail with steps/toolHistory
buildStatus: vite build succeeded (server build has pre-existing errors from missing router files)
notes: Backend already had all needed tRPC endpoints (listExecutions, getExecution, getStats). No new backend code was needed. The page follows BrowserSessions.tsx patterns for filters/pagination and agent/ExecutionHistory.tsx patterns for status display.
